raw_consumer_statement: i used my citi visa to pay {$620.00} for a month stay at an rv park called XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX. the resort was closed by Housing & Urban Development for major code violations more than XXXX years ago and didnt have the legal right to rent to me a space or bill me for any reason. I even left early due to electrical problems in my trailer due to the faulty wiring at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. i spoke with XXXX ( XXXX ) customer service rep at HUD who informed me that fenders was closed and they had no legal right to rent me a space and they were obligated to refund my money. There were also handicap access points locked with chains and wire fencing to block access and huge cracks in the sidewalks that were trip hazards and leaking sewage in one area. citi bank did not add me to this citi account as the XXXX for the primary card holder which disallowed my access to the necessary account options to properly resolve this dispute and citi bank has now closed my dispute without even allowing me to tell my side. CITI BANK must add me as the XXXX as I have already faxed to their office a notarized copy of the documents that empower me as the XXXX for the primary so that i can access statements and resolve disputes.
